characters.name: Acnologia
characters.description: "I recognize you as my enemy, Dragon. And I shall slay you." HumanDragonAcnologiaJapaneseアクノロギアRōmajiAkunorogiaAliasThe Black Dragon (黒竜Kokuryū)The Black Dragon in the Book of Apocalypse (黙示録にある黒き龍Mokushiroku ni aru Kuroki Ryū)[1]The Dragon King (竜の王Ryū no Ō)[2]The Dragon of Magic (魔竜Maryū)[3]Doctor (ドクターDokutā)[4]CharacteristicsRaceHuman (former)[5]DragonGenderMaleAge400+[6]Hair ColorDark BlueEye ColorGreen (Manga)Blue (Anime)Professional StatusPrevious OccupationDoctor[4]MageBase of OperationsEarth LandRift in Space and Time(partially)Montes Secreta(former)Personal StatusStatusDeceasedRelativesUnnamed Parents (Deceased)MagicMagicArcane Dragon Slayer MagicTime MagicHealing MagicDebutsManga DebutChapter 251Anime DebutEpisode 121(silhouette)Episode 122(actual)Movie DebutFairy Tail: Dragon CryNovel DebutWish on a StarGame DebutFairy Tail Brave SagaPortrayalJapanese VoiceKōsuke ToriumiEnglish VoiceJ. Michael TatumImage Gallery Acnologia(アクノロギアAkunorogia), known to be fearsomely reputed asThe Dragon King(竜の王Ryū no Ō), was a cataclysmically powerfulDragon Slayerthat can take the form of aDragonat any time due from his overuse ofDragon Slayer Magicand bathing in the blood of the Dragons he killed.[7]He was referred to asDoctor(ドクターDokutā) in his early life that took care of Dragons but due to them murdering his family, destroying his city, and "claiming" the life of achild, he took it upon himself using thenameof the Dragon whom he despised to slay every Dragon in existence, believing they only cause destruction and pain.[8]

characters.name: Aed
characters.description: AedJapaneseエイドRōmajiEidoCharacteristicsRaceHumanGenderMaleProfessional StatusPrevious AffiliationHeartfilia KonzernPrevious OccupationHeartfilia KonzernServantBase of OperationsHeartfilia Konzern(formerly)Personal StatusStatusActiveDebutsManga DebutChapter 68Anime DebutEpisode 29PortrayalEnglish VoiceScott FreemanImage Gallery Aed(エイドEido) is a chef who formerly served theHeartfilia Konzern. Aed is a small man with seemingly shaved head who's mostly seen with his eyes closed, or maybe half-closed. His most distinctive feature is his large, round nose, which is visibly darker on the front, as if it were burnt, possibly a reference to Aed's profession as a cook. He seems to have rather hairy arms.

characters.name: Ajeel Raml
characters.description: "Revere me as a God!! And beg for my forgiveness! If you do, I'll grant you the mercy of a quick death." Ajeel RamlJapaneseアジィール・ラムルRōmajiAjīru RamuruAliasDesert King (砂漠王Sabaku Ō)CharacteristicsRaceHumanGenderMaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorBlackProfessional StatusAffiliationAlvarez EmpireEmpire Mark LocationRight ShoulderOccupationEmperor of theAlvarez EmpireMagePrevious OccupationShield of SprigganLeader of the Ajeel SquadPrevious TeamSpriggan 12Ajeel SquadBase of OperationsVistarionPersonal StatusStatusActiveRelativesYajeel(Grandfather)MagicMagicSand MagicDebutsManga DebutChapter 443(silhouette)Chapter 445(actual)Anime DebutEpisode 278(shadowed)Episode 287(actual)PortrayalJapanese VoiceHiromichi TezukaEnglish VoiceJosh BangleImage Gallery Ajeel Raml(アジィール・ラムルAjīru Ramuru) is part of theAlvarez Empire, wherein he was one of theSpriggan 12, the elite personal guard ofEmperor Spriggan,[1]and led his own team inside the Imperial Army, theAjeel Squad.[2]His epithet within the empire isDesert King(砂漠王Sabaku Ō) for his mastery ofSand Magic.[1]Following the death of Zeref, he rose to be the Emperor of Alvarez in X793 in attempt to rebuild the empire.[3]

characters.name: Akane Mascot
characters.description: Akane MascotCharacteristicsRaceHumanGenderMaleEye ColorBlackProfessional StatusAffiliationAkane Resort CasinoOccupationMascotBase of OperationsAkane BeachPersonal StatusStatusActiveDebutsAnime DebutEpisode 33PortrayalEnglish VoiceDennis MaherImage Gallery TheAkane Mascotis the unnamed person who works as the mascot of the famous casino located inAkane. The Akane Mascot is a relatively tall man who wears a costume that  seems to be based on a kind of bird. The costume he wears consists of a large round sky blue colored head, two big eyes, a pair of triangle shaped ears, a crown, and an opened bill with a red tongue and a hole for the head of the wearer. He wears a large purple bow tie with a large white bib that has yellow trimmings that cover half of his upper body. He also wears a round pink ball for pants with a heart design on the front and an aqua bird tail on the back. He also wears two large aqua gloves.[1]

characters.name: Akula
characters.description: AkulaJapaneseアクーラRōmajiAkūraAliasThe Great White Shark[1]CharacteristicsRaceHumanGenderFemaleEye ColorBlackHair ColorBlackPersonal StatusStatusActiveMagicMagicShark SpiritDebutsGame DebutFairy Tail Portable GuildImage Gallery Akula(アクーラAkūra),"The Great White Shark", is a playable character in the video gameFairy Tail Portable Guild.[1] Akula is a relatively short and slim woman with peach skin and short, black, spiky hair. Her revealing outfit consists of a red top that is opened wide to reveal her cleavage that is slightly covered by her black and white bikini top.[1]She wears a pair of tight red shorts that, because of their minuscule length, resemble underwear. The shorts have belt loops and in the loops is a black belt with a white buckle. She wears a pair of black leggings that cut off right above her inner thigh and a pair of white boots with sky blue slits on the foot of them. She also wears a pair of white gloves and two metallic bracelet-type accessories on both of her upper arms.[1]

characters.name: Alta Face
characters.description: Alta FaceJapaneseアルタ・フェイスRōmajiAruta FeisuCharacteristicsRaceUnknownProfessional StatusPrevious AffiliationElentearBase of OperationsElentearPersonal StatusStatusDeceasedDebutsManga DebutFairy Tail: 100 Years Quest Chapter 69Anime DebutFairy Tail: 100 Years Quest Episode 20PortrayalJapanese VoiceTakuya NakashimaEnglish VoiceCampbell CooleyImage Gallery Alta Face(アルタ・フェイスAruta Feisu) was an underground monster and the source of the overflowing Magic Power inElentear.[1][2] Alta Face is a gigantic monster with a face resembling theMagic WeaponofEarthland'sMagic Council. It has an amorphous mass with dark spots and is rooted into the ground, its countless hands grow out from its back.[1]

characters.name: Anchor
characters.description: DragonHumanAnchorJapaneseアンカーRōmajiAnkāAliasThe Sea Prison Dragon (海獄竜Kaigokuryū)The Water Dragon God (水神竜Suijinryū)CharacteristicsRaceDragonGenderMaleHair ColorPurpleEye ColorYellowBlue (Human Form)Professional StatusAffiliationIgniaTeamCalamity BloodsPersonal StatusStatusActiveMagicMagicWater Dragon Slayer MagicTransformation MagicDebutsManga DebutChapter 328Anime DebutEpisode 192Image Gallery Anchor(アンカーAnkā) is aDragonknown asThe Sea Prison Dragon(海獄竜Kaigokuryū) as well asThe Water Dragon God(水神竜Suijinryū), is one of theCalamity Bloods. His past self invadedFiorethrough the malfunctioningEclipse Gateduring the X791 Grand Magic Games.[1] Like most dragons, Anchor is large and sports a midnight-green shade coloration. The upper part of his head, back, tail, arms, legs and talons are covered in tough scales. His underbelly and jaw—lined with sharp teeth—are crimson and smooth, and his abdominal muscles are especially well-defined. Unlike most dragons, Anchor does not have claws. Instead, he has extendeddigitswith a dark, smoothpatagium, making his flight more like a bat’s than a dragon’s. Spikes also run down his spine and along his tail, which ends in a rippled, almost torn shape that has the same color as his underbelly.[2]

characters.name: Angelica
characters.description: AngelicaJapaneseアンジェリカRōmajiAnjerikaCharacteristicsRaceRatGenderFemaleEye ColorBlackHair ColorLight BlueProfessional StatusOccupationPetTeamTeam LyonPartner(s)Sherry BlendyBase of OperationsGaluna Island (formerly)Personal StatusStatusUnknownDebutsManga DebutChapter 27Anime DebutEpisode 11PortrayalJapanese VoiceRyōko OnoEnglish VoiceHeather WalkerImage Gallery Angelica(アンジェリカAnjerika) is a giant rat, owned and used in battle bySherry Blendy. Angelica appears to be a giant rat, as she possesses rodent-like features. According to Sherry, Angelica is female, thus, she dresses her in a feminine manner: Angelica wears a black corset-style top with pink frilly edges which is tied up the front with black strings. Completing her outfit is a white lace headband and a red ribbon tied across her chest. She also has turquoise fur and a huge tail that propels, giving her the ability to fly.

Completing her outfit is a white lace headband and a red ribbon tied across her chest. She also has turquoise fur and a huge tail that propels, giving her the ability to fly.

characters.name: Animus
characters.description: DragonHumanAnimusJapaneseアニムスRōmajiAnimusuCharacteristicsRaceDragonGenderMaleHair ColorBlonde (Human)Eye ColorYellow (Dragon)Purple (Human)Professional StatusPrevious AffiliationDragonsKingdom ofStellaPrevious OccupationKing ofStellaBase of OperationsAltairPersonal StatusStatusDeceasedMagicMagicDragon Slayer MagicThought ProjectionTelekinesisWeaponsDragon Cry(former)DebutsAnime DebutEpisode 327(flashback)Movie DebutFairy Tail: Dragon CryNovel DebutWish on a StarGame DebutFairy Tail Goku • Mahō RanbuPortrayalJapanese VoiceMakoto FurukawaEnglish VoiceMichael SinterniklaasImage Gallery Animus(アニムスAnimusu) was aDragonwho became the king ofStella.[1] In his true form as a Dragon, Animus is a blue, scaly large beast with his most distinct physical features being jagged, crystallized features resemblingStellaniumprotruding from his body, such as his horns and claws. His jaw is spiky, while his wings are in the same design with jagged edges coming from them.[1]

characters.name: Ankhseram
characters.description: AnkhseramJapaneseアンクセラムRōmajiAnkuseramuCharacteristicsRaceGodGenderUnknownPersonal StatusStatusActiveMagicMagicAnkhseram Black MagicDebutsManga DebutChapter 436(mentioned)Anime DebutEpisode 284(mentioned) Ankhseram(アンクセラムAnkuseramu) is aGodworshiped inMildianwho rules over life and death.[1] Sometime over 400 years ago, Ankhseram cursedZeref Dragneelwith the Contradictory Curse as punishment for trying to devisea wayto bring his brother,Natsu Dragneel, back to life.[1]Mavis Vermillionwas similarly cursed roughly 300 years later when she cast theBlack MagicofLawto save her friendYuri Dreyar's life, inadvertently deciding who would live and who would die.[2]

She was the teacher of the fiveDragon Slayersthat were sent to the future in order to eradicateAcnologia.[1]She is a member of the Heartfilia Clan, and is considered byAquariusto be an amazingCelestial SpiritMage.[2]She is currently engaged toIchiya Vandalay Kotobuki.[3] Anna's full appearance

characters.name: Aquarius
characters.description: "What's more important?! Memories?! Keys?! Feelings of guilt?! I don't think so! It's the power to save your friends! The power as a Celestial Spirit Wizard!" AquariusJapaneseアクエリアスRōmajiAkueriasuAliasThe Water Bearer (宝瓶宮Hōheikyū)CharacteristicsRaceCelestial SpiritGenderFemaleHair ColorLight BlueEye ColorBlueProfessional StatusKey TypeGoldOwnerLucy HeartfiliaPrevious OwnerAnna HeartfiliaLayla HeartfiliaGrammiDaysOriginally WednesdaysPersonal StatusStatusActiveCounterpart(s)Eclipse AquariusWay of CombatMagicWater MagicWeaponsMagic UrnDebutsManga DebutChapter 1Anime DebutEpisode 1Movie DebutFairy Tail: Phoenix PriestessNovel DebutFairy Tail: The Color Residing Within The HeartGame DebutFairy Tail Gekitotsu! She isScorpio's girlfriend. Her key was owned byLucy Heartfiliauntil she sacrificed it in order to summon theCelestial Spirit King.[1]Nevertheless, Lucy still owns a part of her original key.[2]Later on, Lucy regained possession of her key again after finding it inGuiltina.[3]
